cacheVariables.//VCPKG_TARGET_TRIPLET-rationale: x64-windows-static-md: static-link our deps (no third-party DLL deps at runtime) but use the DYNAMIC MSVC CRT (/MD). SkyrimNet's PublicAPI.h documents an ABI requirement: 'Both DLLs must use the same MSVC version and CRT linkage (dynamic /MD).' Using the static CRT (x64-windows-static + MultiThreaded) lets short SBO strings round-trip but corrupts the heap on longer returns, because each /MT DLL owns a private heap.
cacheVariables.//CMAKE_MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY-rationale: Match the triplet above — /MD in release, /MDd in debug. Pairs with VCPKG_TARGET_TRIPLET=x64-windows-static-md so every TU in our DLL plus every dep links against the dynamic CRT and shares one heap with SkyrimNet.
